ValidationRule.description: Restricting record creation for all users associated with distressed profiles
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( $Profile.Name = 'CFG - Distressed Collection',$Profile.Name = 'CFG -Distressed Team Lead', $Profile.Name = 'CFG-Distressed ParaLegal Only') ,ISNEW() )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot create a settlement record
